name: AdvancedHallucinationGuardrailByWSO2
description: Validates response content using an advanced hallucination detection model powered by WSO2 guardrails. If the content is detected as hallucinated, the guardrail intervenes and returns an error response.

policyAttributes.name: name
policyAttributes.description: The name of the guardrail policy. This will be used for tracking purposes.

policyAttributes.name: jsonPath
policyAttributes.description: The JSONPath expression used to extract content from the payload. If not specified, the entire payload will be used for validation.

policyAttributes.name: connectKnowledgeBase
policyAttributes.displayName: Connect to a Vector Database for Hallucination Detection through Grounded Knowledge
policyAttributes.description: If enabled, the hallucination detection leverages a vector database to verify whether the response is grounded in the knowledge base.

policyAttributes.name: passthroughOnError
policyAttributes.description: If enabled, the response is passed through without validation when the hallucination detection service is unavailable. Otherwise, a guardrail validation error is triggered.

policyAttributes.name: showAssessment
policyAttributes.description: When enabled, the error response will include detailed information about the reason for the guardrail intervention.
